hooks.command: cd /Users/jimrice1959/Documents/workspace/tech-prep/claude/ClaudeEventManager_Java_1 && if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --staged --quiet; then SUMMARY=$(git diff --name-only; git diff --staged --name-only | sort -u | head -3 | paste -sd ', '); git add -A && git commit -m "Auto-commit: $SUMMARY" && git push origin main; fi 2>/dev/null || true
